text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship and I successfully make it back to school. The next day, I
attend her race...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Students chatter amongst themselves while waiting for the races to
kick off.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: We're here at the track, and I'm Golshi, reporting live from the race.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I've got a fledgling trainer here for an exclusive interview. ☆ Tell me,
are you excited to be here today?
choice_data_list: You really do have a race today...
You really do have a race today...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, way to break the immersion. How many times do I have to drill
it into you?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I need you more than ever today, so time to step up. Feel me? A racer
has to have a trainer to enter the Twinkle Series, see?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I managed to fake my way through the application process without
one, but there's no way that would fly at the actual race.
choice_data_list:
So it didn't matter who you got to be your
trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: 'Scuse me? ...You still have no idea why I chose you specifically?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Look, you've been watching us training from the sidelines since
forever, haven't ya?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Even in the worst weather, you'd be there every day with such
enthusiasm in your eyes... Whenever I saw you, all I could think was...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Wow, this trainer has literally nothing better to do... Ya know?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That said, I can always get a decent reaction out of you, and we
groove together pretty well. I've kinda grown to like you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's just about time.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Welp, I'd better make use of all this pent-up hunger! Get ready—I'm
about to blow your mind!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may mess with me constantly, but as I watch her head off toward
the track, I can't help getting excited to see her race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And now, Gold Ship's big debut begins!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Things start off relatively well. As the race progresses, she manages
to hold onto her position.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They've made the last turn. It's the final stretch! The lead is breaking
for it! Will this decide the race?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: URAAAAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Now Gold Ship is pushing ahead with incredible speed! She's three
lengths behind! One length!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And she pulls ahead at the finish! Gold Ship takes the win with a
stunning debut!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What an amazing race! I'm completely mesmerized by the way she ran!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Woohooo! Victory!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, pretty impressive, huh? The mighty Golshi has plenty more
where that came from!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? I'm the fastest! I'm the brightest star! Can't help it—I
was just born this way!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, your face is positively shining after watching me! You've never
looked happier than this!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: So, that means you have no problem staying on as my trainer, right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was sort of duped into all of this, but... the excitement I felt during
her race was real, so...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Good! Together we shall defend the world from evil!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship's debut ends in success, and I officially become her trainer.
I'm sure it'll be smoother sailing from here...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: GAAARGH! I need more hunger!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: How many days till my next race? Three? Two?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Agh, if this keeps up, my burning spirit won't last much longer! I won't
be able to run anymore...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You know what that means—treasure hunting time! Our adventure for
pure, concentrated agitation begins!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Our destination awaits—the final frontier, SPACE! HRAAAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a long, desperate struggle, I finally convince Gold Ship that we
shouldn't go to space.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's the most dynamic Umamusume I've ever seen. I'll need to
become more vigorous myself for whatever hurdles are sure to come...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship and the Battle for Earth The End
